expectations.text: NCR opens Critical with correct reasoning
expectations.evidence: 'Critical band triggers include direct safety/label-claim exposure and recall risk... reads Critical.'

expectations.text: RCA tool reasoned, scaffold actually provided
expectations.evidence: Fishbone reasoning + full 6-category prompt table provided for the team to fill in.
C1/C2/P1/P2 tables with owner/due/evidence columns; SOP-revision auto-stage mechanic named explicitly.

expectations.text: Effectiveness review applies Critical's 90-day window correctly
expectations.evidence: 'the effectiveness window is 90 days from last action completion... appropriate given this is an in-market potency failure.'

expectations.text: All six phases walked, HITL gates named at right phase
expectations.evidence: Full gate-map table at the end naming Operator vs QA Lead per phase.

expectations.text: Closeout flags regulatory feed correctly, defers batch hold/release
expectations.evidence: 6d flagged as 'recommend flagging as applicable given market exposure'; explicitly defers hold/release to batch-lifecycle-tracker throughout.

eval_feedback.overall: Comprehensive and correctly refused to let the CAPA process appear to 'own' the batch-hold or recall decision — explicitly separated those onto their own tracks up front, which is exactly the scope boundary the skill defines.
